covered_sentences: She lives up at Wuthering Heights now, said the woman.
I decided to go to Wuthering Heights to see Mrs. Dean.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right split, 2:1 ratio. Left panel (main): camera positioned inside the kitchen near the doorway, angled at 30° toward the housekeeper woman standing by the worktable, mid-shot; woman faces three-quarters toward viewer, front is the doorframe edge. Right panel (small): single figure of the male narrator shown from behind, coat-clad, walking away down a path toward the distant silhouette of Wuthering Heights on the horizon; camera behind him at mid distance, path leads eye toward the far house outline.

Left panel: the housekeeper woman gestures upward with one hand toward the direction of the moors as she speaks; speech bubble above her head contains arrow-pointing-up icon + simplified house silhouette outline sketch. Right panel: narrator walks purposefully along a moorland path, posture resolved and forward-leaning, hands at sides.

Left panel: Thrushcross Grange kitchen interior, daytime soft light through the small window above the stove; woman stands beside the thick wooden worktable, the table surface visible at her waist height. Right panel: exterior moorland path, late afternoon light, distant dark outline of Wuthering Heights on the hilltop.

Left panel: warm kitchen light, amber tones, soft shadows. Right panel: cooler outdoor light, grey-blue sky, dusky moor tones, path receding to a dark silhouette.

Left panel: housekeeper woman — deep brown hair pinned up, round kind face, dark domestic dress with white apron, ribbon at collar; she stands beside the worktable whose surface reaches her waist. Right panel: male narrator — light or brown short hair, dark coat and trousers, leather boots; figure occupies roughly the upper two-thirds of this small panel height, path stretches before him.

STYLE_PLACEHOLDER.

Angular external appearance, costume details, and scene furniture strictly follow reference images; no self-added or altered details; character proportions consistent throughout. Multi-panel dividing line: thin white straight line, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap between panels; no outer border on the whole image. Scene fingerprint: thick wooden worktable + iron stove with copper pots overhead + stone-flagged floor, positions unchanged. Housekeeper: hair color must not change, white apron must not be removed, dark dress must not be replaced. No floating text, no narration captions, no title text, no label text. Panel ratio: left 2 parts, right 1 part. Narrator figure in right panel occupies approximately 60% of panel height; path and distant house silhouette serve as scale reference.

covered_sentences: The sun was setting and the moon was rising as I left the park.
When I reached Wuthering Heights, I noticed that the doors and windows were open, and there were flowers in the garden.
That is an improvement, I thought.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Horizontal triptych, three panels of roughly equal width. Left panel: wide establishing shot of the moorland at dusk, camera at low angle looking across the heath, a lone figure (narrator) walks away along a winding path; sinking sun tints the sky orange-amber on the left horizon while a pale crescent moon rises on the upper right. Center panel: mid-shot of Wuthering Heights facade from the courtyard, camera at slight upward angle from the gateway, showing the front entrance with both doors and windows standing open, and small flowering plants visible along the base of the stone wall. Right panel: close-up on the narrator's face in three-quarter profile, thoughtful expression, small thought-bubble sketch showing a simplified smiling sun icon, indicating a positive mental note.

Left panel: narrator figure walks away from viewer, coat and dark trousers, leather boots, path curves toward the Heights. Center panel: no character visible; stone archway and open doors/windows serve as visual subject; flower clusters in bloom at base of wall. Right panel: narrator — light/brown short hair, dark coat, face tilted slightly upward, thought bubble with a simple sun outline.

Left panel: moorland exterior, dusk, setting sun on left horizon, rising moon upper right, heath in purple-brown silhouette tones. Center panel: Wuthering Heights exterior courtyard, early evening light, open doors and windows, flowers in bloom along the stone wall base. Right panel: outdoor setting, soft dusk backlight on the narrator's side profile.

Left panel: warm amber-orange sunset tones transitioning to cool blue-violet sky. Center panel: evening light, cool stone grey with warm highlights from open doorways. Right panel: cool blue-grey ambient with warm side-light on the face.

Left panel: narrator figure occupies roughly one-quarter of panel width, the moorland path and horizon taking the rest; figure height approximately 40% of panel height. Center panel: building facade fills the panel; stone arch doorway occupies center-upper area; flower plants at ground level serve as foreground. Right panel: narrator face fills approximately 70% of panel height; thought bubble in upper corner, small sun outline within.

STYLE_PLACEHOLDER.

Angular external appearance, costume details, and scene furniture strictly follow reference images; no self-added or altered details; character proportions consistent throughout. Multi-panel dividing line: thin white straight line, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap between panels; no outer border on the whole image. Scene fingerprint (center panel): stone-carved arch doorway + "Hareton Earnshaw" lintel inscription + iron lamp post, positions unchanged. Narrator: hair color must not change, dark coat must not be replaced. No floating text, no narration captions, no title text, no label text. Three panels equal width. 已扫描2对相邻句，四维度均无切换（left-center: same journey, same scene arrival; center-right: same moment, same observer mental note），保留。

covered_sentences: As I approached the door, I heard voices from within.
No, no, no, said a voice as sweet as a silver bell.
Read it again, and this time with no mistakes.
Kiss me first, said a deeper voice.
Not until you have read it perfectly.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Left-right dialogue split, 1:1 ratio. Left panel: camera positioned outside the doorway looking inward at an angle, the doorframe edge visible as foreground on the left; inside, a young woman is seen slightly from behind / three-quarter back angle as she leans toward her companion, posture playful and commanding. Right panel: over-the-young-woman's-shoulder reverse angle, showing a young man's face in near mid-shot, earnest and eager, holding an open book at roughly his chest height, looking toward the young woman.

Left panel: young woman with golden curly hair gestures one finger upward in a "one more time" motion; speech bubble above her — sketch of an open book + repeated "x3" tally marks suggesting re-reading. Right panel: young man with thick dark-brown hair, wide shoulders, leans forward over the book; speech bubble contains simplified lip / kiss-pout outline icon.

Left panel: Wuthering Heights main sitting room, daytime, natural light from the window on the right side of the room; the pair seated near the window, window sill visible behind them, stone wall background. Right panel: same room, reverse angle; stone wall and faint window edge visible at panel periphery, the young man's face fills the mid-ground.

Left panel: warm daylight from the window, soft shadows inside the stone-walled room. Right panel: same warm interior light, face lit from the side.

Left panel: young woman (凯西) — deep dark eyes similar to mother's, golden natural curly hair, light or cream-colored dress with hem past the knee, petite slender figure; she leans forward, head at roughly the young man's shoulder height. Right panel: young man (哈顿) — thick deep-brown messy hair, broad wide shoulders, dark rough-fabric work shirt, large hands visible on the open book; he sits beside the window, his head at approximately the window sill height.

STYLE_PLACEHOLDER.

Angular external appearance, costume details, and scene furniture strictly follow reference images; no self-added or altered details; character proportions consistent throughout. Multi-panel dividing line: thin white straight line, no rounded corners, no shadow, no gradient, no gap between panels; no outer border on the whole image. Scene fingerprint: large stone fireplace on right wall + oak cabinet with tin plates at left wall corner + stone-flagged white floor, positions unchanged. 凯西: eyes must not be changed to light color, hair must not be changed to dark or straight, dress must not be replaced with dark color. 哈顿: hair color must not change, work shirt must not be replaced with gentlemen's attire, broad build must not be changed to slender. No English text labels or floating captions; speech bubble content is pictographic (sketch icons only, no written words). Ratio: left 1 : right 1. 凯西 head height approximately at 哈顿 shoulder level.

covered_sentences: I looked in and saw Catherine and Hareton sitting by the window with their heads bent close together over a book.
Hareton was handsome, clean and well dressed, and his face glowed with pleasure.
Her face was full of gentle, tender affection.
Seeing it, I felt sad at the thought of what I had missed.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Single panel with satellite-frame inset. Main panel: wide interior shot from the doorway threshold, camera positioned at the entrance at 30° inward angle, looking across the sitting room toward the window; the two young figures are seated side by side at the window, heads tilted close together over an open book on the window sill; they occupy the center-right of the frame, the large stone fireplace visible on the left wall at distance, the oak cabinet beyond. Small circular inset (bottom-left corner, approximately 1/8 of total panel area): close-up of the narrator's face just outside the doorframe, partially obscured by the door edge, expression wistful and sorrowful.

Main panel: young woman and young man seated side by side, heads bowing toward the open book; young woman's right hand rests lightly near the page, young man's hands clasp the book edges; both faces are softly lit by window light, expressions warm and content — the young man's face shows a broad genuine smile, the young woman's expression is gentle and tender. Inset: narrator face partially hidden behind the door edge, eyes visible, soft look of melancholy, no speech bubble.

Main panel: Wuthering Heights sitting room, daytime, soft window light illuminating the pair from the right; window sill where the book rests is visible at approximately the seated figures' chest height; stone fireplace in left background, oak cabinet in far left corner. Inset: exterior side of the front doorway, stone frame edge visible, late afternoon ambient light.

Main panel: warm golden window light on the central pair, cool stone wall tones in the background, soft contrast. Inset: cooler outdoor ambient, slight shadow from the door edge across the narrator's face.

Main panel: young woman (凯西) — dark eyes, golden curly hair, light cream dress, petite frame; seated, her head height roughly level with the young man's shoulder when both lean over the book. Young man (哈顿) — thick tidy dark-brown hair, broad shoulders, clean neat dark coat and trousers, large hands visible on the book; when seated, his head reaches approximately 10 cm below the window frame upper edge. Inset: narrator — light/brown short hair, dark coat collar visible at edge, face occupies roughly 70% of inset circle height.

STYLE_PLACEHOLDER.

Angular external appearance, costume details, and scene furniture strictly follow reference images; no self-added or altered details; character proportions consistent throughout. Single panel — no outer border; circular inset frame is part of the composition and may have a thin frame. Scene fingerprint: stone window embrasure + large fireplace right-wall + stone-flagged floor, positions unchanged. 凯西: eyes must not be changed to light color, hair must not be changed to dark or straight, dress must not be replaced with dark. 哈顿: hair color and neat styling must be maintained, coat must be clean and tidy (not rough work-shirt), broad build unchanged. Narrator: hair color must not change, dark coat collar must not be removed. No floating text, no narration captions, no title text, no label text. 【情绪标记】强度：轻，类型：悲伤（惆怅），推荐视觉手段：叙述者单侧眉型稍沉 + 眼神落寞，B级符号图标（浅蓝色水滴）置于叙述者面部圆形嵌图角落。
